content: Backend: install reportlab; PM models support checklist_groups (component -> sub-items), location field
Backend: GET /pm-tasks/{id}; complete endpoint accepts per-row results + done_by/checked_by
Backend: GET /pm-tasks/{id}/pdf (blank + completed) matching reference sheet layout
Backend: public endpoints - POST /public/breakdowns + GET /public/report-context, submitted_via flag
Backend: migrate seeded PM templates to structured checklist_groups
Frontend: ChecklistBuilder component (grouped rows) in PM create dialog
Frontend: dedicated Close PM Task page with per-row OK/NOT-OK + remarks
Frontend: PDF download buttons (blank + last completion)
Frontend: Login page public Report Breakdown + dialog publicMode + PUBLIC badge in Breakdowns
Test: full backend + frontend testing agent pass
